tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetches a URL from the internet and extracts its contents as markdown. Can fetch web pages, APIs, and other HTTP resources.

parameters.name: maxLength
parameters.description: Maximum number of characters to return (default: 5000)

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: Start content from this character index for pagination

parameters.name: raw
parameters.description: Get raw content without markdown conversion (default: false)
